title: Auto-escalate CEO corrections from prose to enforced constraints
description: When the CEO states a correction twice, it should automatically become an enforced constraint — not remain prose that reviewers may miss. Phase 1 is research (define detection heuristics for 'what counts as a correction stated twice'), Phase 2 is build (generator + integration). Depends on the constraint checker existing to receive generated constraints.

in: Research: define heuristics for detecting repeated corrections
Correction sources: MEMORY.md, preferences.md Standing Corrections, conversation patterns
Generator: produce constraint definition JSON from detected correction prose
Integration: new constraints auto-added to constraint checker rule set
Digest reporting: 'New constraints generated this directive' section
Manual override: CEO can reject auto-generated constraints
out: Modifying how MEMORY.md is managed by Claude Code

dod.criterion: Detection heuristics documented with examples of true positives and false positives
Given a correction in Standing Corrections, the pipeline generates a valid constraint definition
Generated constraints are automatically loaded by the constraint checker
Digest includes 'New Constraints' section when corrections are escalated
CEO can review and reject auto-generated constraints before they become active

checklist: Manually add a correction to Standing Corrections — verify constraint is generated
Verify generated constraint catches violations when run through checker
Verify digest shows the new constraint

reviewers.domain: architecture — heuristic quality, false positive rate, generated constraint correctness
product — is the correction-to-constraint flow intuitive for CEO?

tasks.title: Research: analyze existing corrections to define detection heuristics
Design: correction-to-constraint mapping rules and generated constraint format
Build: correction detector — scan Standing Corrections + MEMORY.md for patterns
Build: constraint generator — produce constraint JSON from detected correction
Integrate with constraint checker and digest template
Test with real corrections — validate detection accuracy and constraint quality
